summary: The Alley Boss hosts a live stream where he mentors a middle-aged novice player named Choi Yoon, who is motivated by a desire to impress his daughter. During the lesson, the Alley Boss demonstrates the mechanics of 'counter-attack' skills and provides Choi with a powerful weapon to aid his progress toward reaching bronze rank. Following the session, the Alley Boss receives an urgent quest notification regarding an upcoming necromancer invasion, prompting him to assemble a team of familiar allies to handle the defense.
key_moments: The Alley Boss introduces Choi Yoon on his stream and reviews his low-level status.
The Alley Boss demonstrates counter-attack timing against a high-ranked opponent to teach Choi.
The Alley Boss receives a notification about an impending necromancer invasion and recruits his former party members to help.
